text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant

text: So I was at  urlLink English Summer Rain  today and was greeted by a rather scary picture, of a tubby man in a bikini, holding a Martini whilst smoking a ciggie.  Now he wasn’t drinking alone cause he has a tan dog.                 Now I had no idea what a weemee was until I followed the link.  It is a way of creating your own personalized character to have it displayed on your IM. Apparently.  And apparently billions of people have done this already.                 Quite frankly, I am afraid.  The fact that it does sort of like   ded   is enough to put a shiver down the spine.  But   ded   with facial hair…now I, for one, fully support the right for bloggers to have a bit of poetic license but I think   ded   is stretching the truth a little bit too far there.  Most 13 year old boys have more facial hair than smooth baby face himself (as do most grandmothers!).                 It also looks like   ded   has been sinking into the banger and mash and washing it down with a few too many pints, cause that figure hugging black bikini is letting it all hang out…and over the sides. I am guessing he went for the black two piece because MSN didn’t allow the use of chaps.                   The hat and glasses are vintage   ded  .                   And who doesn’t love a man with piggy tales.                 End of Rant
